details.test: Task 1: Place holds on newest grade 8 print books at Lincoln
Task 2: Create reading list and add up to three ebooks
Task 3: Renew all loans due within 7 days
Task 4: Place hold on highest-rated digital item with high school pickup
Task 5: Compare two print books and add higher-rated to Science Fair Ideas list
Task 6: Add three subject-browsed items to favorites and verify sorting
Task 7: Save one ebook and one other resource to Science Paper - Climate list
Task 9: Place holds on first up to three volumes of a series
